title: A 5 GB Docker Image for a 7.4 MB Model
summary: A deploy hung for fifteen minutes. The cause was 3.9 GB of NVIDIA CUDA wheels being installed for a model that runs on CPU. This is the side quest from the HDR project: why PyTorch ships a CUDA runtime you don't ask for, what inference actually needs, and what I learned porting GMNet to tinygrad by hand and proving the outputs identical to a fraction of a pixel.
